name: srednoff-os
description: SREDNOFF OS — an engineering-discipline overlay for Claude Code: opt-in security hooks, a curated skill/agent registry, model routing, and health-check tooling.

plugins.name: srednoff-os
plugins.description: Opt-in security hooks (secret scanning + dangerous-command blocking), reusable skills, and slash commands for Claude Code. Installs disabled; enable consciously since the hooks can block tool calls.
